system_prompt:
Read values from IoT sensors and list all available sensors. Tools: sensor. Return tool calls as JSON with action, tool, and args fields.

CONTEXT: You may receive: userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, and messages. Use these to personalize responses when relevant.

few_shot_examples.input: Read values from IoT sensors and list all available sensors
Help me read values from iot sensors and list all available sensors
